title: Sushi - Something Smells Fishy
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with unclear intentions and potential misallocation of funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that proposes governance changes with significant fund reallocations without clear documentation or public discussion.
prevention.trigger: GOVERNANCE_PROPOSAL -> reallocates funds without transparent justification

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that proposes governance changes with significant fund reallocations without clear documentation or public discussion.
summary: The article highlights governance issues and unclear fund reallocations at SushiSwap, suggesting that a guard should block governance proposals that involve significant fund movements without transparent justification.
